description: Testing chart display behavior with and without data

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check default display when DB has not data
expected_result: Do not display chart <base on spec>

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check default display when DB has data
expected_result:
2. Display correctly as designed:
+ Position
+ Chart type
+ Label of item
+ Color
+ Title name
+ Axis X name
+ Axis Y name
+ Data Label 
+ Legend 
+ Value of each node value

description: Testing chart title display and interactions

expected_result:
Display correctly as designed:

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check operation when:
+ Hover on chart title
+ Click on chart title
+ Multi-click on chart title
expected_result: Display and operation correctly as spec

description: Testing chart loading indicators and final display

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check default display progress bar/waiting cursor while load chart
expected_result:
2. Display progress bar/waiting cursor correctly <base on spec>
+ Position
+ Color
+ Percentage of load

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check default display progress bar/waiting cursor after load chart completely
expected_result:
Not display progress bar/ waiting cursor and Display correctly as designed:
+ Position
+ Chart type
+ Label of item
+ Color
+ Title name
+ Axis X name
+ Axis Y name
+ Data Label 
+ Legend
+ Value of each node value

description: Testing real-time data updates in chart

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check realtime update when increasing data for 1 item on DB
expected_result:
Display correctly chart with correctly data changed real-time:
+ Increase data value corresponding changed data

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check realtime update when Descreasing data for 1 item on DB
expected_result:
Display correctly chart with correctly data changed real-time:
+ Descrease data value corresponding changed data

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check realtime update when Change data for 1 item = 0/ NULL on DB
expected_result:
Display correctly chart with correctly data changed real-time:
+ Display value = 0 for changed data

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check realtime update when Change data for 1 item has multiple format (date, number, character,..)
expected_result:
Display correctly chart with correctly data changed real-time:
+ Display value = 0 for different format of each node value

description: Testing non-real-time data updates in chart

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check not realtime update when increasing data for 1 item on DB
expected_result: Just update displaying after reload chart page

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check  not realtime update when Descreasing data for 1 item on DB
expected_result: Just update displaying after reload chart page

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check not realtime update when Change data for 1 item = 0/ NULL on DB
expected_result: Just update displaying after reload chart page

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check not realtime update when Change data for 1 item has multiple format (date, number, character,..)
expected_result: Just update displaying after reload chart page

description: Testing real-time item additions and deletions in chart

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check realtime update when Delete one item on DB
expected_result:
Display correctly chart with correctly items changed real-time:
+ Hide correctly deleted item

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check realtime update when add more item on DB
expected_result:
Display correctly chart with correctly items changed real-time:
+ Display correctly added item

description: Testing non-real-time item additions and deletions in chart

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check not realtime update when Delete one item on DB
expected_result: Just update displaying after reload chart page

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check not realtime update when add more item on DB
expected_result: Just update displaying after reload chart page

item_type:
Scroll
<Max high: N, max long: M >
description: Testing scroll behavior based on chart dimensions

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check display scroll for small chart: smaller than or equal to N and M
expected_result: Not display scroll

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check display scroll for high chart : bigger than N
expected_result: Display vertical scroll

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check display scroll for high chart : longer than long M
expected_result: Display horizontal scroll

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check Zoom in/Zoom out chart
expected_result:
Zoom in/out chart correctly:
+ Not broke UI

expected_result:

+ Text on tooltips 
+ Value on tooltips is same as node value

description: Testing chart display with different date ranges

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check the display of chart when change period From - To date value:
+ Data in a day: From = To = Today
expected_result:
+ Chart is displayed correctly as the type
+ Data of chart is displayed correctly 
+ It shows the detail of data correctly

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check the display of chart when change period From - To date value:
+ Data in a day: From = To # Today

Check the display of chart when change period From - To date value:
+ Data in a day: From = To = The oldest date in database

Check the display of chart when change period From - To date value:
+ Data in a week

Check the display of chart when change period From - To date value:
+ Data in a month

Check the display of chart when change period From - To date value:
+ Data in a year

Check the display of chart when change period From - To date value:
+ Data in special period: From last month to this month, from last year to this year

Ex: 15/6/2018 ~15/7/2018
01/01/2017~01/01/2018

item_type: Check some special chart and data
description: Testing chart behavior with special data conditions

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check some special chart and data when:
+ There are no data in special period

Ex: Share price
1. Check the share price in the period 2018/01/01 ~ 2018/01/02
(New year holiday and there are no Stock Exchange )
2. Check the share price at the time the Stock Exchange has out of working time
Ex: At mid night
      Before 8:30 o'clock (the working time will start from 8:30 o'clock)
expected_result:
+ Chart is displayed correctly
+ Data of chart is displayed correctly

test_view_points.viewpoint:
There are no data in special period when:
+ There are no data in that day

Ex: Share price
      There is problem with the Stock market and there is no Stock Exchange be run in that day
